docs.title: NUH Data
docs.text:
Research datasets from Nottingham University Hospitals NHS Trust (NUH), one of the largest acute NHS trusts in England, serving a population of approximately 2.5 million across Nottinghamshire and surrounding counties.

All datasets are pseudonymised research views. Access is subject to a formal data access request.

docs.title: Systemic Anti-Cancer Therapy (SACT)
docs.text:
33,156 patients · 2009–present · Quarterly

Patient-level records of systemic anti-cancer treatments (chemotherapy, targeted therapies, immunotherapy, and other drug-based cancer treatments) administered.

docs.title: Cancer Outcomes and Services Dataset (COSD)
docs.text:
Full cancer pathway · Nottinghamshire

Patient-level records spanning the cancer care pathway at NUH.

docs.title: Geographic and Temporal Coverage
docs.text: Dataset Geography Start End Frequency SACT Nottinghamshire, England January 2009 Ongoing Quarterly COSD Nottinghamshire, England January 2024 Ongoing TBC

docs.title: NUH Systemic Anti-Cancer Therapy Dataset (SACT)
docs.text:
Clinical dataset documenting systemic anti-cancer treatment records from Nottingham University Hospitals NHS Trust. Covers patients receiving systemic anti-cancer therapies (chemotherapy and other systemic treatments) from 2009 onwards, capturing patient demographics, regimen details, cycle data, and individual drug administrations.

URI: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/sact

Name: sact

docs.title: Enum: PerformanceStatusAdult
docs.text: WHO performance status classification for patients aged 19 years and above, indicating activity level and disability.

docs.title: Enum: PersonStatedGenderCode
docs.text: Person's gender as self-declared.

docs.title: Enum: SACTAdministrationRouteCode
docs.text: Prescribed method of delivery for each administration in a SACT cycle.

docs.title: Class: SACTResearchView
docs.text: Flat research view combining patient, regimen, cycle, and drug administration data. Corresponds to RVW.SACT_RESEARCH_VIEW in the source database. Each row represents a single drug administration event, with regimen and patient context repeated per row.

docs.title: Sparqlpath
docs.text:
search: boost: 1.0 ---# Type: Sparqlpath

A string encoding a SPARQL Property Path. The value of the string MUST conform to SPARQL syntax and SHOULD dereference to zero or more valid objects within the current instance document when encoded as RDF.

search: boost: 1.0 ---# Type: String

A character string

A time object represents a (local) time of day, independent of any particular day

docs.title: Enum: YesNoIndicator
docs.text: Simple yes/no indicator.

docs.title: Slot: actual_dose_per_admin
docs.text: Dose in mg or other applicable unit for each administration in a SACT cycle.

docs.title: Slot: adjunctive_therapy
docs.text: Adjunctive therapy is therapy given in addition to the main therapy to maximise its effectiveness. Records whether the therapy was Adjuvant (after the main therapy), Neo-Adjuvant (before the main therapy), or not applicable.

docs.title: Slot: admin_meas_per_actual_dose
docs.text: Units of measurement used for each administration in a SACT cycle.

docs.title: Slot: administration_date
docs.text: The date on which the anti-cancer drug was administered to a patient, an infusion commenced, or an oral drug initially dispensed to the patient.

docs.title: Slot: clinical_trial
docs.text: Records whether the patient is currently in an active Systemic Anti-Cancer Therapy trial.

docs.title: Slot: co_morbidity_adjustment
docs.text: Whether the patient's overall physical state (other diseases and conditions) was a significant factor in deciding on the regimen, or in varying the dose or treatment interval.

docs.title: Slot: consultant_gmc_code
docs.text: Code of the consultant who initiated the SACT treatment. Derived from the GENERAL MEDICAL COUNCIL REFERENCE NUMBER.

docs.title: Slot: consultant_spec_code
docs.text: Specialty code of the consultant who initiated the SACT treatment.

docs.title: Slot: cycle_number
docs.text: Cycle number, numbered sequentially within each regimen.

docs.title: Slot: date_decision_to_treat
docs.text: The date on which the consultation between the PATIENT and the clinician took place and a Planned Cancer Treatment was agreed.

docs.title: Slot: date_of_birth_mid_month
docs.text: Approximate date of birth using the 15th of the birth month, for use in age calculations while preserving patient privacy.

docs.title: Slot: date_of_birth_month
docs.text: Month component of the patient's date of birth, extracted from DATE OF BIRTH for privacy preservation.

docs.title: Slot: date_of_birth_year
docs.text: Year component of the patient's date of birth, extracted from DATE OF BIRTH for privacy preservation.

docs.title: Slot: diagnosis_code_snomed
docs.text: SNOMED CT concept ID identifying the clinical diagnosis given to the patient.

docs.title: Slot: dm_d
docs.text: The unique ID from the dm+d (Dictionary of Medicines and Devices) database, based around the drug name and manufacturer. Pilot item for v3.0, required only for official Pilot sites.

docs.title: Slot: drug_name
docs.text: The name of the anti-cancer drug, taken from the British National Formulary.

docs.title: Slot: height_start_reg
docs.text: Height in metres at start of SACT regimen.

docs.title: Slot: intent_of_treatment
docs.text: Intent of the SACT regimen.

docs.title: Slot: llsoa
docs.text: Lower Layer Super Output Area, derived from PATIENT POSTCODE for geographic analysis while preserving patient privacy.

docs.title: Slot: morphology_icd_o
docs.text: Morphology coded using ICD-O at time of decision to treat. This is the Morphology ICD-O at the start of the Systemic Anti-Cancer Therapy. Required for Haematology cases.

docs.title: Slot: nhs_number_status
docs.text: The NHS NUMBER STATUS INDICATOR CODE indicates the verification status of the NHS number provided.

docs.title: Slot: org_id_code_provider
docs.text: The ORGANISATION IDENTIFIER of the Organisation acting as a Health Care Provider. Complies with ANANA standard DCB0090.

docs.title: Slot: org_identifier_sact_admin
docs.text: Organisation Identifier of the organisation responsible for each administration in a SACT cycle. Complies with ANANA standard DCB0090.

docs.title: Slot: ot_admin_meas_per_actual_dose
docs.text: Free-text description of a unit of measurement not available within the coded [admin_meas_per_actual_dose] field. Only populated when code 98 (Other) is selected.

docs.title: Slot: perf_stat_start_cycle_ad
docs.text: WHO performance status at start of the cycle, for patients aged 19 years and above.

docs.title: Slot: perf_status_start_reg_ad
docs.text: WHO performance status at start of the regimen, for patients aged 19 years and above.

docs.title: Slot: person_stated_gender_code
docs.text: Person's gender as self-declared (or inferred by observation for those unable to declare their PERSON STATED GENDER).

docs.title: Slot: primary_diagnosis
docs.text: Primary diagnosis at time of decision to treat, coded using ICD. This is the PRIMARY DIAGNOSIS (ICD) at the start of the Systemic Anti-Cancer Therapy.

docs.title: Slot: pseudo_nhs_number
docs.text: The NHS NUMBER, the primary identifier of a PERSON, is a unique identifier for a PATIENT within the NHS in England and Wales. Pseudonymised for research use.

docs.title: Slot: regimen
docs.text: The acronym derived from the drugs used in the Anti-Cancer Drug Regimen, used to identify the drugs used in the regimen.

docs.title: Slot: route_admin_snomed_ct_dm_d
docs.text: The SNOMED CT concept ID from the NHS Dictionary of Medicines and Devices identifying the route of administration.

docs.title: sact
docs.text:
Clinical dataset documenting systemic anti-cancer treatment records from Nottingham University Hospitals NHS Trust. Covers patients receiving systemic anti-cancer therapies (chemotherapy and other systemic treatments) from 2009 onwards, capturing patient demographics, regimen details, cycle data, and individual drug administrations.

URI: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/sact

docs.title: Slot: sact_administration_route
docs.text: The prescribed method of delivery for each administration in a SACT cycle.

docs.title: Slot: start_date_cycle
docs.text: Date of first drug administration in each cycle.

docs.title: Slot: start_date_regimen
docs.text: The first administration date of the first cycle of a regimen.

docs.title: Slot: unit_meas_snomed_ct_dm_d
docs.text: The SNOMED CT concept ID from the NHS Dictionary of Medicines and Devices identifying the unit of measurement.

docs.title: Slot: weight_start_cycle
docs.text: Weight in kilogrammes at start of the cycle.

docs.title: Slot: weight_start_of_reg
docs.text: Weight in kilogrammes at start of SACT regimen.
